properties.titulo_evento: US withdrawing 5,000 troops from Germany, US officials say
properties.descricao: The move comes as a rift over the Iran war widens between President Donald Trump and Europe.

properties.descricao: Palestinian journalists in Gaza marked World Press Freedom Day by honouring colleagues killed and targeted by Israel.
